turns.tutor_turn:
Now try this similar problem on your own without any hints. Show your reasoning step by step:

While preparing balloons for Eva's birthday party, her mom bought 70.6 balloons and 1800cm³ of helium. One balloon needs 50cm³ to float high enough to touch the ceiling, and she can fill any remaining balloon with ordinary air. turns.learner_turn: The answer to that problem would be 11.
